details: The agent ran kubectl commands against the cluster and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending → because PVC data-cache is unbound → because StorageClass fast-ssd does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' exists). The agent cited the ProvisioningFailed event explicitly mentioning 'storageclass.storage.k8s.io "fast-ssd" not found' and confirmed no PVs exist. The complete causal chain was identified and reported.
